settings.title: Settings
settings.data.compareExportHint: Readable compare exports now live inside each compare turn so backup JSON can stay focused on migration and restore.
settings.recipesHint: Recipes use the models currently selected in the side panel.
settings.packsLibraryHint: Built-in packs now live in the compare workspace. Keep this panel focused on your own saved recipes.
settings.analysis.enable: Turn on AI Compare Analyst for follow-up summaries and next-question suggestions
settings.analysis.boundary: Core compare stays local-first. AI Compare Analyst reuses a browser tab you already trust and sends one visible analysis prompt there.
settings.analysis.browserSessionBody: Run one structured analysis prompt through a supported tab you already keep signed in.
settings.analysis.byokBody: This browser build does not execute provider API-key requests directly. Future non-browser analysis lanes will route through a Switchyard-backed runtime instead.
settings.analysis.byokNote: Keep this lane gated until the Switchyard runtime integration exists.
settings.analysis.modelHint: Prompt Switchboard tries this tab first, then falls back to another ready model if needed.
settings.guidesBody: Open the strongest setup and support guides when you need the install path, supported sites, first compare repair map, or FAQ answers. MCP starter kits and agent guides stay available when you are ready for the builder lane.
settings.guidesBuilderBody: Open these only after the first compare path is healthy. They are for host setup, MCP wiring, and agent-side integration.

chat.subtitle: Select AI models above and chat with multiple AIs simultaneously
chat.inputPlaceholder: Type a message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.clearConfirm: Clear all messages in this session? This cannot be undone.

input.footer: Send one prompt, then compare the answers in one local workspace.
input.starterPrompt.structure: Compare how ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity would explain browser extension state management.
input.starterPrompt.rewrite: Rewrite this paragraph in a clearer, friendlier tone for a GitHub README.

promptPacks.writing.name: Writing Pack
promptPacks.writing.description: Compare tone, clarity, and structure before you publish or share a draft.
promptPacks.writing.clearerRewrite.title: Clearer rewrite
promptPacks.writing.clearerRewrite.prompt: Rewrite this paragraph in a clearer, friendlier tone for a GitHub README.
promptPacks.writing.launchSummary.title: Launch summary
promptPacks.writing.launchSummary.prompt: Summarize this launch plan in three crisp bullets for a product update.
promptPacks.research.name: Research Pack
promptPacks.research.description: Compare how different models frame trade-offs, blind spots, and recommendations.
promptPacks.research.tradeoffs.title: Trade-off framing
promptPacks.research.tradeoffs.prompt: Compare the trade-offs between React and Vue for a browser extension UI.
promptPacks.research.conflictingViewpoints.title: Conflicting viewpoints
promptPacks.research.conflictingViewpoints.prompt: Explain the strongest argument for and against local-first AI comparison workflows.
promptPacks.coding.name: Coding Explanations Pack
promptPacks.coding.description: Use multiple models to compare debugging explanations and architecture breakdowns.
promptPacks.coding.debug.title: Debug explanation
promptPacks.coding.debug.prompt: Explain why a browser extension might fail during a persistent-context Playwright test run.
promptPacks.coding.architecture.title: Architecture walkthrough
promptPacks.coding.architecture.prompt: Explain this browser extension architecture to a new maintainer in plain English.
promptPacks.rewrite.name: Rewrite Pack
promptPacks.rewrite.description: Stress-test rewriting, localization, and editing tasks with a reusable compare set.
promptPacks.rewrite.landingPage.title: Landing page rewrite
promptPacks.rewrite.landingPage.prompt: Rewrite this product description so a first-time visitor understands it in under 10 seconds.
promptPacks.rewrite.bilingual.title: Bilingual explanation
promptPacks.rewrite.bilingual.prompt: Explain this feature in English first, then rewrite it in plain Chinese for a teammate.

compare.empty: Send a prompt to compare model responses side by side.
compare.emptyTitle: Compare multiple AI answers without tab juggling
compare.pendingFallback: Waiting for the model to respond...
compare.errorFallback: Prompt delivery failed before a response was received.
compare.highlight.compareBody: Line up the same prompt across multiple models in one clean board.
compare.highlight.localBody: Use your existing browser sessions without a hosted relay or account layer.
compare.highlight.setupTitle: Setup help when you need it
compare.highlight.setupBody: Jump straight to the install guide, first compare guide, supported sites list, FAQ, or trust boundary without leaving the compare-first story.
compare.highlight.builderBody: MCP starter kits and agent guides are useful after the first compare succeeds, not before.
compare.highlight.reuseBody: Open the supported AI sites you already use and route one prompt across them.
compare.orchestration.title: Quick seed lane
compare.orchestration.summary: Use these manual seed shortcuts when you already know the next move. For the staged product path, use the workflow panel first.
compare.orchestration.manualHint: Use the workflow panel for staged next steps. The quick actions here stay manual.
compare.orchestration.actionJudge: Draft a tighter follow-up review prompt when this turn still needs another compare round.
compare.orchestration.actionRetry: Retry the failed models first, then compare the refreshed turn.
compare.orchestration.actionWait: Wait for the remaining models before deciding which answer to continue from.
compare.orchestration.actionContinue: Keep the strongest answer in view, then seed the next compare from that card or continue in the original tab yourself.
compare.timeline.title: Run timeline
compare.timeline.readinessHint: Prompt Switchboard checks the tab and controls first.
compare.timeline.handoffHint: The extension confirms the right tab is listening.
compare.timeline.executionHint: The prompt is typed and submitted on the target site.
compare.timeline.responseHint: The answer appears and updates flow back into the board.
compare.timeline.readinessBlocked: This model needs a readiness fix before the compare run can continue.
compare.timeline.currentFailed: The run failed before an answer completed
compare.packsBody: Start from reusable compare packs instead of a blank prompt when you want faster, more consistent experiments.
compare.onboarding.title: First compare checklist
compare.onboarding.stepModels: 1. Pick the models you want to compare
compare.onboarding.modelsReady: You already have models selected. Keep them, or refine the list before the first run.
compare.onboarding.modelsMissing: Start by choosing at least one model from the selector in the header.
compare.onboarding.stepReady: 2. Make sure at least one tab is ready
compare.onboarding.readyCount: {{count}} selected model looks ready for the first compare run.
compare.onboarding.readyBlocked: Some selected models still need attention. Open the right tabs, sign in if needed, then refresh readiness.
compare.onboarding.readyUnknown: Open the sites you want to use, then run a readiness check before sending the first prompt.
compare.onboarding.repairHelpBody: Use the first compare guide, supported sites page, FAQ, or trust boundary to recover the blocked model before you run readiness again.
compare.onboarding.repairModelHostMissing: Prompt Switchboard has not confirmed a usable host for this model yet.
compare.onboarding.stepPrompt: 3. Start with a prompt that makes differences obvious
compare.onboarding.promptHint: Pick a question that invites structure, trade-offs, or a rewrite so the compare board is worth reading.
compare.followUpBuilder.intro: Review the following model answers from the same original prompt.
compare.followUpBuilder.goal: Identify the strongest answer, the key disagreements, and the next follow-up question worth asking.
compare.export.nextMoveContinue: Continue from the strongest completed answer.
compare.export.noFollowUpReason: No follow-up reason was generated for this turn.
compare.export.localFirstNote: Prompt Switchboard keeps this compare export local-first. This file is generated inside the browser workflow and does not require a hosted relay.

analysis.title: Turn compare results into the next-step seed
analysis.boundary: Core compare stays local-first. The analyst runs one structured prompt through your chosen browser tab and keeps the result inside this workspace as suggested next-step guidance, not an auto-run workflow.
analysis.boundaryBlocked: Core compare stays local-first. The direct BYOK lane is gated in this browser build because provider docs say production API keys should not be exposed client-side.
analysis.role.ready: This panel is a decision checkpoint. It suggests the next move, but you still choose what to send.
analysis.role.pending: Run the analyst when you want decision guidance. Until then, compare stays a manual review step.
analysis.coverage: completed answers in this compare turn
analysis.empty: Wait until at least two model answers are complete before running AI Compare Analyst.
analysis.blocked.title: Direct BYOK analysis is gated in this build
analysis.blocked.body: Prompt Switchboard keeps the BYOK lane disabled here because provider guidance says browser builds should not ship production API keys client-side.
analysis.blocked.fallback: This analysis provider is blocked in the browser build.
analysis.blocked.turnTitle: AI analysis is blocked for this turn
analysis.blocked.turnBody: Recover the missing prerequisite, then run the analyst again.
analysis.disabled.title: AI Compare Analyst is turned off
analysis.disabled.body: Turn the analyst back on in settings when you want an extra compare-result summary lane.
analysis.modelBlocked.title: The analyst tab is not ready yet
analysis.modelBlocked.body: Open the selected analyst model in a normal signed-in tab, then run one more readiness check before starting the analysis lane.
analysis.loading.title: Analyzing this compare turn
analysis.loading.consensus: Summarizing consensus across the completed answers
analysis.loading.disagreement: Looking for meaningful disagreement, not just length differences
analysis.loading.nextQuestion: Drafting the strongest next compare seed for the follow-up round
analysis.recommendedAnswerModel: {{model}} is the best answer to seed the next compare from.
analysis.recommendedAnswerNone: No single answer is reliable enough to recommend yet.
analysis.actions.useNextQuestion: Seed next compare with suggested question
analysis.actions.workflowHint: Use the workflow panel to stage or run the next compare. The actions below only prepare guidance and seed text.
analysis.actions.guidanceBody: These actions help you inspect or copy the analyst recommendation before you decide what to run next.
analysis.actions.seedBody: These actions only prepare the next prompt in the composer. They do not auto-run the next compare.
analysis.actions.nextQuestionBody: Prepares the strongest next prompt in the composer for the selected follow-up models. You still choose when to send it.
analysis.actions.recommendedBody: Prepares the recommended answer in the composer as a next-round seed. It is guidance, not a final verdict.
analysis.actions.synthesisBody: Prepares a reusable draft in the composer. You still decide whether to send it.
analysis.actions.useRecommendedAnswer: Seed next compare from recommended answer
analysis.actions.useSynthesis: Seed next compare with synthesis draft
analysis.failure.title: AI analysis did not finish
analysis.failure.runtime: The browser-session analysis lane could not finish this request.
analysis.errors.providerUnavailable: The selected analysis provider is not available in this build.
analysis.errors.disabledInSettings: The AI Compare Analyst is turned off in settings.
analysis.errors.compareInFlight: Wait for the active compare run to finish before starting AI analysis.
analysis.errors.turnMissing: Prompt Switchboard could not find this compare turn for analysis.
analysis.errors.startFailed: Prompt Switchboard could not start the browser-session analysis run.

workflow.title: Linear, resumable next step
workflow.summary: Prompt Switchboard keeps workflow compare-first: compare first, optionally analyze, then seed the next compare without turning the product into an autonomous agent runner.
workflow.boundary: This workflow stays browser-native and local-first. It helps you resume the next action, but it does not auto-run hosted orchestration, DAGs, or remote jobs.
workflow.title.runnableSeedReady: Ready to stage the next move
workflow.title.runnableNeedsAnalysis: Ready to turn this compare into the next move
workflow.title.waiting: Workflow is waiting on a browser-side step
workflow.title.blocked: Workflow is blocked until this turn is ready
workflow.body.withAnalysis: Use the current compare evidence and analyst output to stage a clear next-round prompt.
workflow.body.needsAnalysis: Prompt Switchboard can run AI Compare Analyst first, then stage the strongest next-round prompt.
workflow.body.waiting: Prompt Switchboard is waiting for browser-side work to finish before it can stage the next step.
workflow.body.seedReady: Prompt Switchboard has staged a next-round seed. You can place it in the composer or run the next compare now.
workflow.body.errorFallback: Prompt Switchboard could not turn this compare turn into a next-step workflow yet.
workflow.body.runningCompare: Prompt Switchboard is sending the staged next-round prompt through the compare-first lane.
workflow.body.completeMoreAnswers: Finish at least two answers before Prompt Switchboard can stage the next move.
workflow.actions.runAnalystAndStage: Run analyst, then stage next step
workflow.actions.fixAndRetry: Fix the blocker, then run workflow again
workflow.actions.waitingHint: This is a real running step, not just a seed action
workflow.actions.seedHint: Choose whether to stage the prompt or send the next compare now
workflow.seed.title: Staged next-round seed
workflow.meta.seedOnlyValue: they stage the next prompt, they do not auto-send
workflow.hint.seedNextStep: Seeding prepares the next compare prompt or target. It does not auto-send the next compare run.
workflow.hint.runNextCompare: Running the next compare is still an explicit compare action.
workflow.errors.analysisRequired: Run AI Compare Analyst first so Prompt Switchboard can stage the next question.
workflow.errors.turnMissing: Prompt Switchboard could not find this compare turn for workflow staging.
workflow.waiting.preparing: Preparing the next-step workflow from this compare turn…

runtime.deliveryTimeout: This model timed out before it could respond.
runtime.deliveryRuntime: Prompt Switchboard could not deliver this prompt to the target tab.
runtime.deliveryHandshake: Prompt Switchboard could not confirm that the target tab was ready.
runtime.deliveryRejected: This model rejected the prompt request before a response was received.
runtime.readinessTabMissing: {{model}} is not open in a signed-in browser tab.
runtime.readinessTabLoading: {{model}} is still loading. Give the tab a moment and try again.
runtime.readinessModelMismatch: {{model}} is open, but this tab does not match the expected chat surface.
runtime.readinessSelectorDrift: {{model}} looks open, but Prompt Switchboard could not confirm the input controls on this page.
runtime.readinessContentUnavailable: {{model}} did not confirm readiness from the current browser tab.
runtime.analysisTurnMissing: Prompt Switchboard could not find this compare turn for analysis.
runtime.analysisStartFailed: Prompt Switchboard could not start the browser-session analysis run.
runtime.analysisRuntimeFailed: Prompt Switchboard could not finish AI analysis in the target tab.
runtime.contentPromptDriveFailed: Prompt Switchboard could not drive {{model}} on this page.
runtime.contentScraperMissing: Prompt Switchboard could not find an active scraper for this page.
runtime.contentAnalysisDriveFailed: Prompt Switchboard could not drive {{model}} on this page for AI analysis.

readiness.summaryOk: Selected models look ready, or Prompt Switchboard is checking them now.
readiness.summaryIssue: Some selected models need attention before the next compare run.
readiness.repair.summary: Resolve the blocking models here, then run one more readiness check before the next compare.
readiness.repair.tabMissingTitle: Open this model in a normal signed-in tab
readiness.repair.tabMissingBody: Prompt Switchboard cannot route the next compare run until this model is open in the same browser profile.
readiness.repair.tabLoadingTitle: Let this tab finish loading, then re-check
readiness.repair.tabLoadingBody: The target chat surface is still loading, so Prompt Switchboard is waiting for the page to settle before it can safely send.
readiness.repair.modelMismatchTitle: This tab is open, but it is the wrong chat surface
readiness.repair.modelMismatchBody: Open the expected site for this model, then run readiness again so the compare flow points to the right page.
readiness.repair.selectorDriftTitle: Prompt Switchboard found the page, but could not confirm the send controls
readiness.repair.submitMissingBody: The input area is present, but the send action is not. This usually means the page is mid-load, signed out, or the site markup changed.
readiness.repair.selectorDriftBody: This page may be signed out, on the wrong screen, or affected by selector drift. Re-open the model tab and re-check before the next run.
readiness.repair.contentUnavailableTitle: Prompt Switchboard could not complete the in-tab handshake
readiness.repair.contentUnavailableBody: Re-open the model tab or refresh the page, then run readiness again before the next compare attempt.

session.heading: Recent comparisons
session.subtitle: Keep every compare run, switch contexts fast, and reopen the tabs you already trust.

app.subtitle: Ask once, compare multiple AI chats side by side from one browser workspace.

analysisInsights.summaryTabLoading: The tab is still loading, so Prompt Switchboard is waiting before it can continue.
analysisInsights.summaryTabMissing: A supported model tab is missing, so this compare run could not start there.
analysisInsights.summaryModelMismatch: A tab exists, but it is not the expected chat surface for this model.
analysisInsights.summarySelectorDrift: Prompt Switchboard could not confirm the page controls before the run started.
analysisInsights.summaryReadyCheckBlocked: The compare run stopped before Prompt Switchboard could confirm the tab was ready.
analysisInsights.summaryQueued: Ready check passed. Prompt Switchboard is handing this run off to the active browser tab.
analysisInsights.summaryStreaming: The prompt was delivered and this model is still streaming its answer.
analysisInsights.summaryComplete: This model finished the run and returned a completed answer.
analysisInsights.summaryHandoffBlocked: The tab was found, but Prompt Switchboard could not complete the browser handoff.
analysisInsights.summaryExecutionBlocked: The tab was ready, but the prompt run failed before a final answer could be captured.
analysisInsights.summaryDeliveryBlocked: The model started, but Prompt Switchboard could not complete delivery back into the compare board.
analysisInsights.summaryLifecycleFailed: This run failed after the initial handoff, so Prompt Switchboard could not finish the answer lifecycle.
analysisInsights.reasonDisagreement: Completed answers diverged enough to justify a focused follow-up review round.
analysisInsights.reasonSplit: Some models failed while others completed, so this compare turn is split.
analysisInsights.reasonFailedOnly: Some models failed and need targeted recovery.
analysisInsights.reasonPending: Some models are still pending, so this compare turn is not final yet.
